data.title: Write RED test for enforcement-boundary pre-commit check
data.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## What
Create tests/hooks/test-enforcement-boundary-check.sh with behavioral tests verifying the pre-commit check blocks commits where an enforcement hook sources hook-error-handler.sh.

## File Impact
| Action | File |
|--------|------|
| CREATE | tests/hooks/test-enforcement-boundary-check.sh |
| MODIFY | .test-index |

## Tests to Add
1. test_enforcement_boundary_blocks_handler_source — stage a file with '# hook-boundary: enforcement' header AND a 'source hook-error-handler.sh' line, run the pre-commit check, assert exit code non-zero
2. test_enforcement_boundary_allows_non_enforcement — stage a file WITHOUT '# hook-boundary: enforcement' that sources hook-error-handler.sh, run the check, assert exit code 0
3. test_enforcement_boundary_annotation_driven — stage two files: one enforcement (with header, no source), one non-enforcement (no header, with source), assert only the combination blocks
4. test_enforcement_header_present_no_source_passes — stage a file with enforcement header but no handler source, assert check passes

Each test uses a temp git repo (mktemp -d + git init) to stage files without touching the real repo.

## .test-index
Add RED marker for: plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-enforcement-boundary-check.sh (the check script to be created in T2) — mapping to test_enforcement_boundary_blocks_handler_source
